title: MKU Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for Project Assistant Posts
description: The Madurai Kamraj University (MKU) has declared the official notification for 2026. Allotted various vacancies for Project Assistant Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the M.Sc can grab this chance and apply for the MKU Notification 2026 . Here we included the age limit, selection process, salarystructure, education details, applciation fee, and how to apply for these posts. If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all apply for. Use this ...
